footer_message: This webpage does not use cookies and your data will not be stored and/or resold.
home_intro: As someone with interest in technology and gender and diversity, I have a passion for creating inclusive and equitable solutions and I'm determined to use my skills to bring about positive change. My goal is to develop innovative software that not only represents technological progress, but also contributes to a more diverse and inclusive society. This website explains my experience and projects a bit further, but is still a work in progress. If you encounter any issues, please contact me! Thank you and enjoy looking around :)
proj_intro: I am interested in a variety of topics, which can be divided into two recurring themes: software development and sound art. Below you will find an overview of my projects.
contact_messageSent_text: Thanks! I will contact you as soon as possible.
contact_intro: Do you have a question, a project in mind, or would you simply like to get to know me? Send me a message and I’ll get back to you as soon as possible.
errorMessageMail: Something went wrong. Please try again or email me directly at

projects.mce_description: After starting the Gender and Diversity program, I began working as a student employee at MCE to build a software application to reduce their administrative workload.
projects.hlg_description: At the request of the board members of the Hubert Lampo Society, I am slowly revamping their new website using WordPress.
projects.podcast_description: Together with friends, I occasionally produce episodes of our podcast On Wine. Wies takes care of the content, and I handle the technical aspects. Listen to our most recent episode now!
projects.sc_description: One of my hobbies is creating music. Although it is not of professional quality, I still enjoy it as a form of relaxation. Feel free to listen to my latest song.
projects.mp_description: In addition to recording and creating music, I also perform occasionally.
projects.nextproject_description: For my upcoming project, I will develop a website to showcase my mother's artwork. This website will serve as a portfolio displaying her various creations.

experiences.HLG_description: Redesigning and professionalizing an existing WordPress website, Improving user-friendliness, structure and visual appearance, Aligning with the client around needs and expectations, Support and explanation so the client could manage the website independently
experiences.UA_description: Contributing to a research project on the experiences of employees with a disability, Conducting and transcribing interviews and processing qualitative input, Writing internal and external texts tailored to different target groups, Collaboration with various SPOCs and stakeholders within the university
experiences.MCE_description: Development of a WPF application for administrative management, Analysis of user needs and translation into functional software solutions, Collaboration with the client
experiences.CODIT_description: Development and modification of software components in C# within a consultancy context, Working with Azure technologies in a professional development environment, Introduction to best practices around code quality, testing and documentation, Collaboration within a team of developers on client projects
experiences.CD_description: Analysis and optimization of an existing algorithm for packing board games, Performance comparison before and after optimization, Reporting findings to the development team
experiences.HOGENT_work_description: Participation in qualitative research projects, Attending and transcribing in-depth interviews, Processing confidential research data
experiences.WAREM_description: Student job in a busy hospitality environment, Working efficiently and independently under time pressure, Collaboration within a team with attention to quality and hygiene
experiences.INTRA_description: Supporting daily store activities; cashier and stocking shelves, Helping customers and maintaining a tidy store environment, Taking responsibility during peak moments
experiences.KIQUE_description: Ensuring safety, calm and an inclusive atmosphere during events, Point of contact for tensions or incidents, Collaboration within a diverse team
experiences.ZWVTD_description: Development and facilitation of a workshop for care workers, Translation of academic knowledge into practice, Sensitive and target-group-oriented communication
experiences.HOGENT_study_description: Thesis: Accessibility of the digital infrastructure of university libraries in Flanders for users with a disability.
experiences.UGENT_description: Specialisation in web and mobile applications, Bachelor's thesis: Digital accessibility of Flemish mobile (government) applications for users with a visual impairment.

mce_details.context_description: MCE Evergem contacted me via Randstad asking me to help reduce their administrative workload. They describe their business as providing a customer-focused solution for all issues relating to power cuts, voltage fluctuations, lightning strikes, etc. As part of the maintenance of their UPS systems, maintenance work is carried out to read and analyse the data from the UPS systems. For this, they draw up a ‘Service Report’. Completing this form was taking up too much time.
mce_details.uitgebreideUitlegStap1_uitleg: On the home screen, the user can upload a CSV file containing a machine’s measurements. The user then selects the machine type (single-phase or three-phase), after which the next screen updates accordingly.
mce_details.uitgebreideUitlegStap2_uitleg: The following screen displays customer details, MCE data, machine data and measurements. All data from the CSV file is automatically populated. The user can add further details and choose between PDF or Word.
mce_details.uitgebreideUitlegStap3_uitleg: The application generates a formatted Word or PDF file containing all the data in the correct layout. At the same time, a JSON file is created for any further processing.
